Caption: Number of publications as a function of year in the period 1976–2018 following SCOPUS. Different curves correspond to searches with words in title or abstract or keywords as reported in the inset.

Illustration of the different materials for Lithium-based batteries as discussed in this paper. Silicon-carbon-graphene and Lithium metal as anodes, carbon-sulfur composites, Li-rich layered oxides and carbon-based matrix which can contain catalysts as cathodes. These materials can be combined with both liquid and solid electrolytes to form Li-ion, Li-Sulfur and Li-air batteries. (For interpretation of the references to colour in this figure legend, the reader is referred to the Web version of this article.)
